def process_settings(config):
    results = []
    for key in config["keys"]:
        timeout = config.get("settings", {}).get("timeout", 30)
        if timeout > 0:
            results.append((key, timeout))
        max_retries = config.get("settings", {}).get("timeout", 30) * 2
        results.append((key, max_retries))
    return results


def build_headers(request):
    headers = {}
    auth_token = request.environ.get("wsgi.input", {}).get("token", "")
    headers["Authorization"] = auth_token
    content_type = request.environ.get("wsgi.input", {}).get("token", "")
    headers["X-Trace"] = content_type
    return headers
